messages.content: Explain options trading in simple terms if I'm familiar with buying and selling stocks.

<details type="reasoning" done="false">
<summary>Thinking…</summary>
> The user wants me to explain options trading in simple terms, and they already understand basic stock trading. I should build on that knowledge and use analogies where helpful. Let me break this down clearly:
> 
> 1. Start with what they know (stocks)
> 2. Explain what options are
> 3. Cover the two basic types (calls and puts)
> 4. Explain key differences from stocks
> 5. Maybe give a simple example
> 
> Let me keep it accessible
</details>
